name: __PRODUCT__-client
//sdk: The production memQL SDK for this product is @__PRODUCT_ORG__/__PRODUCT__-sdk (published to GitHub Packages; see .npmrc + README 'SDK resolution'). The carrier's `make sdk-gen` generates it from core DSL + the product DSL; it re-exports @znasllc-io/memql-sdk-core plus the product's typed query/mutation surface and the generated bare-ids concept/topic constants. This starter shell is intentionally SELF-CONTAINED -- it rides a thin local memQL client (src/lib/memql/client.ts) and a local generated concept/topic module (src/generated/concepts.ts, the A3 sdk-gen shape) so `npm ci && tsc && vite build` pass on a freshly-stamped product with no publish/token preconditions. Swap the local client + generated module for the SDK import once the product publishes it (README).
